events.label: assistant
events.text:
Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`.

**Summary:** Worn sheave grooves causing the belt to ride low (near the ID rather than flush with the sheave OD) is a measurable, out-of-tolerance condition per mfr wear-gauge guidance — groove sidewall wear reduces belt wedging action, causing slip, heat, and accelerated wear. I estimated ~1/8 in. (0.125 in.) of wear below flush, exceeding the typical ~3/32 in. allowable limit. Marked `decision: fail`, `risk: medium`, with corrective actions (verify with wear gauge, replace sheaves as a matched set, realign, retension) before this can proceed to closeout.
